title: Remove all WIPO references and hypothetical statistics from every page

requirements.text: In frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx, remove every reference to WIPO (e.g. any section titled 'Integration with WIPO & Sovereign IP', any subtitle copy mentioning WIPO or Sovereign IP integration) and remove all hypothetical or unverified statistics (e.g. '180+ jurisdictions served', any fabricated numeric claims). Do not remove or alter the Mock IP records, the How It Works section, Automated Filing Strategy, SME-First Infrastructure, Open Cryptographic Auditing, or any other content. Preserve the dark navy/gold theme, layout, and all remaining section content exactly as-is.

quotes: Remove all WIPO references and hypothetical statistics (like '180+ jurisdictions served') from every section of the app — Hero, homepage sections, Whitepaper, Footer, and anywhere else they appear — while keeping all Mock IP records intact.

acceptanceCriteria: The Home page contains no text mentioning 'WIPO' in any form.
The Home page contains no section titled 'Integration with WIPO & Sovereign IP' or similar.
Any subtitle or hero copy referencing WIPO or Sovereign IP integration has been removed.
Hypothetical statistics such as '180+ jurisdictions served' or any other unverified numeric claims do not appear on the Home page.
All other homepage sections (How It Works, Automated Filing Strategy, SME-First Infrastructure, Open Cryptographic Auditing, Hero, CTA) remain intact.
Visual theme, layout, and spacing are unchanged.

requirements.text: In frontend/src/pages/Whitepaper.tsx, remove every reference to WIPO, Sovereign IP integration, and any hypothetical or unverified statistics. This includes removing or rewriting the 'WIPO & Sovereign IP Integration' section (section 7 in the current whitepaper) and any inline mentions of WIPO, sovereign IP registries, or fabricated metrics throughout the document. Replace removed WIPO/Sovereign IP content with a neutral section on 'Global IP Ecosystem Interoperability' framed purely as blockchain-as-infrastructure without naming WIPO or any sovereign body. Retain all other sections, the sticky left-sidebar table of contents (updating anchor links to reflect any section title changes), smooth scroll, print-to-PDF button, and the existing dark navy/gold theme.

quotes: Remove all WIPO references and hypothetical statistics (like '180+ jurisdictions served') from every section of the app — Hero, homepage sections, Whitepaper, Footer, and anywhere else they appear — while keeping all Mock IP records intact.

acceptanceCriteria: The Whitepaper page contains no text mentioning 'WIPO' in any form.
The Whitepaper page contains no text mentioning 'Sovereign IP' integration or sovereign registries.
No hypothetical or unverified statistics appear anywhere in the whitepaper prose.
The table of contents sidebar accurately reflects any section title changes.
All other whitepaper sections remain intact with their full prose content.
Sticky TOC, smooth scroll, and print-to-PDF button continue to function correctly.
Dark navy/gold theme with Playfair Display headings and Inter body text is unchanged.

requirements.text: In frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx, remove every reference to WIPO and Sovereign IP integration (including any footer copy, taglines, or navigation links mentioning WIPO). Also remove any hypothetical statistics if present. Do not change the footer's dark navy/gold theme, copyright line, or remaining navigation links (Home, IP Database, Whitepaper).

quotes: Remove all WIPO references and hypothetical statistics (like '180+ jurisdictions served') from every section of the app — Hero, homepage sections, Whitepaper, Footer, and anywhere else they appear — while keeping all Mock IP records intact.

acceptanceCriteria: The Footer contains no text mentioning 'WIPO' in any form.
The Footer contains no text mentioning 'Sovereign IP' integration.
No hypothetical or unverified statistics appear in the Footer.
The Footer's dark navy/gold theme, copyright line, and remaining navigation links are unchanged.

requirements.text: Audit frontend/src/components/Header.tsx, frontend/src/pages/IPDatabase.tsx, frontend/src/pages/RegisterIP.tsx, and any other frontend files not already covered above for any remaining references to WIPO, Sovereign IP integration, or hypothetical statistics (e.g. '180+ jurisdictions served'). Remove all such references. Do not modify Mock IP record data, functionality, or visual styling of any component.

quotes: Remove all WIPO references and hypothetical statistics (like '180+ jurisdictions served') from every section of the app — Hero, homepage sections, Whitepaper, Footer, and anywhere else they appear — while keeping all Mock IP records intact.

acceptanceCriteria: No frontend file outside of Whitepaper.tsx and Home.tsx contains any reference to 'WIPO' or 'Sovereign IP'.
No frontend file contains hypothetical or unverified statistics.
Mock IP records in IPDatabase.tsx remain completely intact.
No visual styling or functionality changes are introduced.

constraints: Do not remove or modify Mock IP records in IPDatabase.tsx.
Do not alter the visual theme, layout, or spacing of any page.
Do not remove any sections other than those containing WIPO references or hypothetical statistics.
Whitepaper.tsx TOC must remain accurate if any section titles change.
nonGoals: Adding new content sections to any page.
Changing the dark navy/gold visual theme.
Altering authentication or Internet Identity flows.
Changing any functionality of the IP registration form or coin dashboard.
